executives.name: Eddy Cue
executives.background: Eddy Cue is Apple’s senior vice president of Services, reporting to CEO Tim Cook. Eddy oversees the full range of Apple’s services, including Apple Music, Apple TV+, Apple News, Apple Maps, Apple Pay, Apple Card, iCloud, and more.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors
